vertical.description: The vertical code this coverage applies to, for example MVA or WC

state.description: Two letter US state code, uppercase

active.description: Whether this supplier is currently live in this state for this vertical

paused_at.description: When this state coverage was paused. Nullable.

paused_reason.description: Reason this state coverage was paused. Nullable.

paused_by.description: The user id who paused it. Nullable.

source_code.description: Optional link to a specific SupplierSource source_code when a supplier has more than one feed and coverage differs by feed. When null, this is the supplier level coverage for the state.
